_comment: C6 plan 檔路徑解析 env 矩陣 golden fixture。兩語言同 OPENCLAW_DATA_DIR 應解析同一默認 plan 檔路徑（相對子路徑 cost_gate_learning_lane/demo_learning_lane_plan_latest.json）。OPENCLAW_DEMO_LEARNING_LANE_PLAN override 優先子測 = PENDING（此分支 Python _default_plan_path 只認 OPENCLAW_DATA_DIR，Rust demo_learning_lane_plan_path 認 override；env 修待 overgate-b/後續 E1 落地——見 E4 report concerns）。錨點 fix/authz-contract-0704。

shared_default_matrix._note: OPENCLAW_DATA_DIR 設定 -> 兩側同解析 <data_dir>/cost_gate_learning_lane/demo_learning_lane_plan_latest.json
OPENCLAW_DATA_DIR 未設 -> 兩側同 fallback /tmp/openclaw

override_priority_matrix_pending._note: PENDING：OPENCLAW_DEMO_LEARNING_LANE_PLAN override。Rust demo_learning_lane_plan_path 取 override（demo_learning_lane_writer.rs:215）；Python _default_plan_path 忽略此 env（只認 OPENCLAW_DATA_DIR）。此分支未含 runtime_adapter env 修 -> 兩側分歧，此子測標 PENDING，依賴 overgate-b(或後續 E1)補 Python override。
